key.name: daily-step-goal
key.summary: Daily step goal shown on the Dashboard ring
key.description: Used to compute the activity ring's progress. 0 hides the goal.

key.name: water-goal-ml
key.description: Used to compute the water ring's progress. 0 hides the goal.

key.name: window-maximized
key.summary: Whether the window was maximised at last close
